Flying Ace.description: Pilot your own miniature plane and control its height as you spin in a circle.

Flying Ace Balloon Race.description: A colorful family balloon ride that spins riders in balloon-shaped seats while experiencing gentle lifts.

Kite Eating Tree.description: A children's drop tower ride that lifts younger riders in the air before releasing them in gentle bounces.

Linus Launcher.description: Lay face down on a family flat ride that spins and tilts, simulating flying on Linus' blanket.

Peanuts 500.description: Spin in circular cars that spin slowly in a circle while shifting tracks in a fun layout.

Peanuts Road Rally.description: Drive a miniature car along a guided track pathway through a cartoon park setting.

Sally's Swingset.description: A children's swing ride that spins younger guests in a gentle circle.

Snoopy's Junction.description: A gentle children's miniature train ride that travels slowly along a loop in the kids area.

Snoopy's Rocket Express.description: An elevated family monorail track ride that carries guests in rocket-shaped cabins slowly around the kids area.

Woodstock Whirlybirds.description: A children's spinning flat ride featuring bird-themed cars that spin slowly in a circle.

Woodstock's Wagon Wheel.description: A children's Ferris wheel offering gentle, scenic views of the kids area from its peak.

Demon Drop.description: A classic Intamin first-generation freefall ride, dropping a four-passenger cabin 10 stories straight down.

Dominator Green.description: A high-thrill drop tower ride that launches riders up to the top of the tower using compressed air.

Dominator Red.description: A high-thrill drop tower ride that drops riders down from the top of the tower using compressed air.

Enterprise.description: A fast-spinning thrill ride that tilts vertically, sending riders upside down in loops without harnesses.

Revolution.description: A giant pendulum ride that swings riders 65 feet in the air while rotating 360 degrees.

Thunder Canyon.description: Embark on a white-water rapids river rafting adventure, spinning through fast currents, splash zones, and waterfalls.

Thunder Creek Mountain.description: A classic log flume water ride featuring drops, curves, and a final plunge down the mountainside.

White Water Landing.description: Plunge down a steep flume drop into a massive splash pool on this classic shoot-the-chutes water attraction.

Aqua Racer.description: A multi-lane mat racing water slide where riders race head-first down closed tubes and open curves.

Aquablast.description: A giant family raft water slide where up to four riders slide down a long, twisted open flume.

Boa Blaster and Constrictor.description: A thrilling set of tube slides at Wildwater Kingdom where riders slide down twisted closed-tube flumes.

Cascade.description: A family water slide featuring gentle curves and drops, culminating in a splash pool.

Jumping Jack Splash.description: A children's log flume water ride featuring gentle drops and splashes.

Lighting Falls.description: A thrilling set of tube slides at Wildwater Kingdom where riders slide down twisted open-tube flumes.

Patriots Plunge.description: A thrilling set of body slides at Wildwater Kingdom where riders slide down twisted closed-tube flumes.

Python Plummet.description: A high-speed body slide featuring a trap door release that drops riders into a near-vertical drop slide.

Wildwater Rapids.description: A family water slide featuring gentle curves and drops, culminating in a splash pool.
